name: Clean Architecture Plugin Marketplace
description: Official marketplace for the Clean Architecture plugin — based on Uncle Bob's Clean Architecture book. Provides 15 skills, a real-time dependency violation hook, and an MCP server with file-system analysis tools.

plugins.name: clean-architecture
plugins.description: Full Clean Architecture plugin for Claude Code. Covers all layers (Entities, Use Cases, Interface Adapters, Frameworks), SOLID principles, component cohesion/coupling, Dependency Rule scanning, Humble Object pattern, and more.
plugins.author: MorcosS
